overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence showing a woman with a crossbow and a child walking through a rocky coastal landscape during golden hour. They follow a path from a narrow ravine through grassy hills to a scenic cliff overlooking turquoise waters, with the camera smoothly following their movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ravine with scattered pine trees

events.description: scene brightens significantly as characters emerge from shadow into golden hour sunlight
pink flowering tree becomes visible ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: following a child NPC who runs ahead through the rocky path, holding the hand of the child companion

notable_agents.action: child running ahead along the path, leading the way toward the flowering tree

entered.detail: tall stone cliff faces enclosing the path on both sides
large tree with distinctive pink blossoms silhouetted against the sky
tall evergreen trees scattered on the rocky slopes

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark rocky ravine with tall cliff walls on both sides. As the camera follows the characters forward, the scene brightens dramatically into golden hour sunlight. A distinctive pink flowering tree becomes visible in the distance ahead, while the path remains enclosed by rocky terrain and scattered pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered boulders approaching the coast

events.description: path opens up from narrow ravine to wider grassy hillside
first glimpse of ocean becomes visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and rocky terrain, following the child NPC who continues running ahead

notable_agents.action: child running ahead toward the coastal overlook, occasionally looking back

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the ground between rocky outcrops
distant blue sea first becoming visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up from the enclosed ravine into a wide grassy hillside dotted with rocks and scattered trees. The pink flowering tree shifts to the right as the characters pass it, while the distant ocean first becomes visible ahead. The path continues through moderate vegetation under bright golden hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge with panoramic ocean views

events.description: full coastal vista becomes visible as characters reach the cliff edge
wooden stairs structure appears on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge overlooking the ocean, holding the child's hand while following the NPC

notable_agents.action: child running ahead along the cliff path, approaching wooden stairs

entered.detail: rocky cliff faces dropping down to the ocean water
weathered wooden staircase built into the rocky cliffside
clusters of yellow flowers growing along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The path reaches the coastal cliff edge, revealing a sweeping view of the ocean and rocky coastline below. The characters walk along the cliff top with the sea visible to the left, passing yellow wildflowers. A wooden staircase structure appears on the right, built into the rock face, while the pink flowering tree recedes into the distance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal descent toward turquoise cove

events.description: path begins descending more steeply toward the water
turquoise colored cove water becomes clearly visible below the cliffs

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the rocky path toward the coastal cove, following the child NPC toward the wooden stairs

notable_agents.action: child waiting near the wooden stairs, looking out at the turquoise water

entered.detail: vibrant turquoise water in the sheltered cove below the cliffs
flock of birds flying over the ocean

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the descent along the rocky coastal path toward a turquoise cove. The wooden stairs on the right draw closer as the path becomes more rugged and steep. The ocean view expands to show the vibrant blue-green water of the cove below, while seagulls fly overhead. The characters continue following the child NPC toward the stairs leading down to the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a dark rocky ravine into a sweeping, sun-drenched coastal vista. It begins within enclosed cliff walls, moving forward as the lighting shifts dramatically from shadow into the bright glow of golden hour, revealing a pink flowering tree in the distance. As the terrain opens up, the camera follows the characters out of the ravine and across a wide grassy hillside, passing the flowering tree as the distant ocean first emerges on the horizon. The scene then expands upon reaching the cliff edge, where the path winds past yellow wildflowers and a wooden staircase built into the rock face. Finally, the camera descends along the rugged coastal path toward a turquoise cove, with the view widening to show vibrant blue-green waters and seagulls flying overhead.
